embeds.title: Travel
embeds.description:
*A sign posted in the square points the direction to the various sections of the city.*

⛩️ - Leave the city by way of the Blessed Gate

🏘️ - Travel to the Residential Quarter

💰 - Travel to the Mercantile Quarter

🏯 - Travel to the Administrative District

🎭 - Enter the Entertainment District

🪦 - Leave the city by way of the Cursed Gate
